creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013
New Revision: 311215
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311215

Log:
  Send SMS messages via the mollie.nl service
  
  WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-SMS-Mollie-0.04/
  
  PR:		ports/175700

Added:
  head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/
  head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net/Makefile

Modified: head/net/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/Makefile	Wed Jan 30 14:13:20 2013	(r311214)
+++ head/net/Makefile	Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013	(r311215)
@@ -660,6 +660,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SIP
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SMPP
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SMS-Clickatell
+    SUBDIR += p5-Net-SMS-Mollie
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SMS-PChome
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SNPP
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-SSH

Added: head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/Makefile	Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013	(r311215)
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Net-SMS-Mollie
+PORTVERSION=	0.04
+CATEGORIES=	net
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	b.smeelen@ose.nl
+COMMENT=	Send SMS messages via the mollie.nl service
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS+= p5-ExtUtils-MakeMaker>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-MakeMaker
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Test-Simple>=0.44:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Simple \
+		p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/distinfo	Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013	(r311215)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Net-SMS-Mollie-0.04.tar.gz) = 73733a1ed6dfca6a5e568474d96753de7adc0dcd7de8f94e5349e43e08f0531b
+SIZE (Net-SMS-Mollie-0.04.tar.gz) = 12310

Added: head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-descr	Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013	(r311215)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Send SMS messages via the mollie.nl service
+
+WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-SMS-Mollie-0.04/

Added: head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-SMS-Mollie/pkg-plist	Wed Jan 30 14:14:44 2013	(r311215)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/SMS/Mollie/.packlist
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Net/SMS/Mollie.pm
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/SMS/Mollie
